subcodes.first_line: O Thou Who art the Primal Origin of creation, the Wondrous Fashioner of all contingent being, the Sovereign of earthly dominion and the Kingdom on high, the Lord of glory and might! Unto Thee be praise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا بادی الاکوان و بدیع الامکان و ملیک الملک و الملکوت و مالک العزه و الجبروت لک الحمد
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
